name: Saucy Ham and Potato Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion in margarine.
2. Blend in flour and seasonings.
3. Gradually add milk, stirring constantly until thickened.
4. Add 1-1/2 cups cheese; stir until melted.
5. Toss potatoes in cheese sauce.
6. Pour into a 2-quart casserole, reserving 1 cup potato slices.
7. Arrange ham and remaining potato slices on top of the casserole.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.
9. Top with remaining cheese.
